channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This new AI tool helps Walmart’s merchandising team plan what’s in stores
item.description: Within Walmart, employees known as merchants make decisions about which products the company carries online and in stores, as well as pricing for those items.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: North Korean hackers are posing as software development recruiters to target freelancers
item.description: Freelance software developers are being hit with infostealing malware to fund the North Korean regime, experts warn.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Apollo GraphQL ships connectors for REST APIs
item.description: Apollo GraphQL, provider of the GraphOS API orchestration platform, has introduced Apollo Connectors for REST APIs, a way to integrate REST APIs into a composable GraphQL architecture without writing boilerplate code. The company also announced GraphOS platform enhancements.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump keeps cutting election security jobs. Here’s what’s at risk
item.description: As the Trump administration continues to dismantle federal agencies, one that plays a critical role in U.S. infrastructure and election security faces an uncertain future.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: Data Breach in Shipping Industry: A Wake-Up Call for Businesses
item.description: A major global shipper, working with Amazon, eBay, and Shopify, exposed 14 million records due to an unprotected AWS bucket. This security incident highlights the need for businesses to prioritize cybersecurity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Versa Networks launches sovereign SASE, challenging cloud-only security model
item.description: SASE since its inception has typically been deployed in a software-as-a-service (SaaS) model, delivering network security services from the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bannon: ‘Oligarchs’ will abandon Republicans
item.description: Steve Bannon argued that the “oligarchs” close to President Trump will abandon Republicans the same way they did to Democrats. Bannon was briefly interviewed by CNN’s Donie O’Sullivan on Wednesday, when he continued his case against tech billionaires Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft unveils company's first quantum computing chip
item.description: Microsoft on Wednesday revealed its first quantum computing chip, Majorana 1, stating it will speed up the development of quantum computers able to solve "meaningful, industrial-scale problems in years, not decades.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How to set up a home network like a pro
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you ensure a smooth online experience with a reliable, secure home network setup.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stealth tracksuit shields you from infrared cameras and electromagnetic signals
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about Vollebak’s Shielding Suit, which blocks EM radiation, infrared and tracking for privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Large language models: The foundations of generative AI
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) such as GPT, Bard, and Llama have caught the public’s imagination and garnered a wide variety of reactions. They are also expected to grow dramatically in the coming years.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PIX 11
